tips: Your calendar is available to your clients 24/7.
Automatic reminders greatly reduce missed appointments.
A “Serenity” deposit deters no-shows and secures your slots.
Share your booking link on Instagram, WhatsApp, your storefront…
Add variations and options: clients pick, the price adjusts automatically.
Ask for a review after each appointment to boost your visibility.
No commission: you keep 100% of your earnings.

proClients.title: Clients

new.label: New
new.hint: First appointment less than 30 days ago.
new.rule: First appointment (any status) less than 30 days ago.

regular.label: Regular
regular.hint: At least 3 confirmed appointments and seen within the last 90 days.
regular.rule: At least 3 confirmed appointments AND last visit within the last 90 days.

vip.label: VIP
vip.hint: At least 10 confirmed appointments or €500 in total revenue.
vip.rule: At least 10 confirmed appointments OR at least €500 in total revenue from confirmed appointments.

atRisk.label: At risk
atRisk.hint: No visit in the last 60 to 180 days.
atRisk.rule: Last visit was 60 to 180 days ago — the ideal window to reach out.

lost.label: Lost
lost.hint: No visit for more than 180 days.
lost.rule: Last visit was more than 180 days ago — considered lost.

noshowProne.label: Frequent no-show
noshowProne.hint: More than 20% no-shows across 3 or more appointments.
noshowProne.rule: At least 3 appointments in total AND more than 20% no-shows.
